name: intel-nic-driver
description: Stage the Intel I225-V (Foxville, e2f) Ethernet driver 1.1.4.45 (WHQL, from Intel Wired driver pack 31.2, NDIS 6.8 Win10/11 x64) into the driver store via pnputil /add-driver, so freshly provisioned units enumerate on the latest driver for I225-V link stability. In-place upgrade of an already-bound NIC needs pnputil /install (resets the NIC) and is intentionally not done here to avoid dropping the provisioning link.
